memberdef.argsstring: () override=default
memberdef.name: ~WritableBuffer

memberdef.argsstring: (Size newSize)=0
memberdef.name: resize

briefdescription.para: Resize this buffer in a memory-efficient way.

detaileddescription.para:
The content of the resized buffer is undefined and must be filled with new content.
newSize
The new size for the buffer.

memberdef.argsstring: (Size size, BufferResizeMode mode, Char fillChar)
memberdef.name: resize

briefdescription.para: Resize this buffer and optionally preserve visible content.

detaileddescription.para:
The default implementation calls resize(Size) for BufferResizeMode::Fast. For BufferResizeMode::PreserveContent, it clones the current buffer, resizes it using resize(Size), and restores the visible content with setFrom(). Implementations can override this when they provide a faster preserve-content path.
size
The new size for the buffer.
mode
How existing content should be handled during resizing.
fillChar
The character to fill newly visible cells with in preserve-content mode.

memberdef.argsstring: (Position pos, const Char &block) noexcept=0
memberdef.name: set

briefdescription.para: Write a block at the given position.

simplesect.para: Writes outside the buffer are ignored.

memberdef.argsstring: (const ReadableBuffer &other)
memberdef.name: setAndResizeFrom

briefdescription.para: Copy the content from another buffer and match its size.

detaileddescription.para:
This buffer is completely overwritten and resized to the size of other.
other
The buffer to copy from.

memberdef.argsstring: (Position pos, const Char &block, const CharCombinationStylePtr &combinationStyle) noexcept
memberdef.name: set

briefdescription.para: Write a block at the given position using a combination style.

parameterdescription.para: The combination style for overwriting existing characters.

simplesect.para: Writes outside the buffer are ignored.

memberdef.argsstring: (Position pos, const StringView &str) noexcept
memberdef.name: set

briefdescription.para: Write a string at the given position.

detaileddescription.para:
NL jumps to the next row. Other control and zero-width characters are ignored. Color (even inherited) overwrites the existing characters. Use drawText(pos, text) for a color overlay.
pos
The coordinates within the buffer.
str
The string to write.

memberdef.argsstring: (const ReadableBuffer &other, Char fillChar=Char::space())
memberdef.name: setFrom

briefdescription.para: Copy the content from another buffer into this one.

detaileddescription.para:
This buffer is completely overwritten but not resized. If there is a size mismatch, the contents are either cut off or filled using fillChar.
other
The buffer to copy from.
fillChar
The character to use for filling if the sizes differ.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Char &fillBlock) noexcept
memberdef.name: fill

briefdescription.para: Fill/clear the buffer with the given character.

parameterdescription.para: The block to use to fill the buffer.

memberdef.argsstring: (Rectangle rect, const Char &fillBlock, const CharCombinationStylePtr &combinationStyle={}) noexcept
memberdef.name: fill

briefdescription.para: Fill the given rectangle.

detaileddescription.para:
Positions outside the buffer are ignored.
rect
The rectangle to be filled.
fillBlock
The block for filling.
combinationStyle
The combination style for overwriting existing characters.

memberdef.argsstring: (Rectangle rect, const Tile9StylePtr &style, Color baseColor={}, const CharCombinationStylePtr &combinationStyle={}) noexcept
memberdef.name: fill

briefdescription.para: Fill the given rectangle using a repeating 9-tile style.

detaileddescription.para:
Positions outside the buffer are ignored.
rect
The rectangle to be filled.
style
The tile style to repeat across the rectangle.
baseColor
The base color underneath the tile style.
combinationStyle
The combination style for overwriting existing characters.

memberdef.argsstring: (Rectangle rect, const Tile9StylePtr &style, CharStyle baseStyle, const CharCombinationStylePtr &combinationStyle={}) noexcept
memberdef.name: fill

briefdescription.para: Fill the given rectangle using a repeating 9-tile style.

detaileddescription.para:
Positions outside the buffer are ignored.
rect
The rectangle to be filled.
style
The tile style to repeat across the rectangle.
baseStyle
The base style underneath the tile style.
combinationStyle
The combination style for overwriting existing characters.

memberdef.argsstring: (Rectangle rect, const Char &frameBlock, const CharCombinationStylePtr &combinationStyle={}) noexcept
memberdef.name: drawFrame

briefdescription.para: Draw a frame inside a given rectangle This will set all blocks at the edge, inside the given rectangle.

parameterdescription.para: The combination style for overwriting existing characters.

memberdef.argsstring: (Rectangle rect, const Char16StylePtr &frameStyle, const CharCombinationStylePtr &combinationStyle={}, Color frameColor={}) noexcept
memberdef.name: drawFrame

briefdescription.para: Draw a frame inside a given rectangle This will set all blocks at the edge, inside the given rectangle.

parameterdescription.para: The combination style for overwriting existing characters.
The base frame color. Any color from the frame style overlays this base color.

memberdef.argsstring: (Rectangle rect, const Tile9StylePtr &style, Color frameColor={}, const CharCombinationStylePtr &combinationStyle={}) noexcept
memberdef.name: drawFrame

briefdescription.para: Draw a frame inside a given rectangle using a repeating 9-tile style.

detaileddescription.para:
This will set all blocks at the edge, inside the given rectangle.
rect
The rectangle for the frame.
style
The tile style for the frame.
frameColor
The base frame color. Any color from the style overlays this base color.
combinationStyle
The combination style for overwriting existing characters.

memberdef.argsstring: (Rectangle rect, FrameStyle frameStyle, Color frameColor={}) noexcept
memberdef.name: drawFrame

briefdescription.para: Draw a frame inside a given rectangle This will set all blocks at the edge, inside the given rectangle.

parameterdescription.para: The base frame color. Any color from the frame style overlays this base color.

memberdef.argsstring: (Rectangle rect, const FrameDrawOptions &options=FrameDrawOptions::defaultOptions(), std::size_t animationCycle=0) noexcept
memberdef.name: drawFrame

briefdescription.para: Draw a frame inside a given rectangle with configurable style, fill, and animated colors.

detaileddescription.para:
This will set all blocks at the edge, inside the given rectangle. If options.fillBlock() is empty and no Tile9Style is active, the interior is left unchanged.
rect
The rectangle for the frame.
options
Frame drawing options.
animationCycle
Animation cycle for frame and fill color animations.

memberdef.argsstring: (Position pos, const GridLayout &layout, const FrameBorder &border) noexcept
memberdef.name: drawGridLayout

briefdescription.para: Draw a grid layout using reusable border styles.

detaileddescription.para:
The layout defines only cell geometry; border defines which lines are visible and how they are styled.
pos
The top-left position of the full grid.
layout
The grid cell layout.
border
The frame border styling for the grid lines.

memberdef.argsstring: (Rectangle rect, const Char &frameBlock, const Char &fillBlock, const CharCombinationStylePtr &combinationStyle={}) noexcept
memberdef.name: drawFilledFrame

briefdescription.para: Draw a box and fill it.

parameterdescription.para: The combination style for overwriting existing characters.

memberdef.argsstring: (Rectangle rect, const Char16StylePtr &frameStyle, const Char &fillBlock, const CharCombinationStylePtr &combinationStyle={}, Color frameColor={}) noexcept
memberdef.name: drawFilledFrame

briefdescription.para: Draw a box and fill it.

parameterdescription.para: The combination style for overwriting existing characters.
The base frame color. Any color from the frame style overlays this base color.

memberdef.argsstring: (Rectangle rect, const Tile9StylePtr &style, const Char &fillBlock, const CharCombinationStylePtr &combinationStyle={}, Color frameColor={}) noexcept
memberdef.name: drawFilledFrame

briefdescription.para: Draw a box and fill it using a repeating 9-tile style for the frame.

parameterdescription.para: The tile style for the frame.
The combination style for overwriting existing characters.
The base frame color. Any color from the style overlays this base color.

memberdef.argsstring: (Rectangle rect, FrameStyle frameStyle, const Char &fillBlock, Color frameColor={}) noexcept
memberdef.name: drawFilledFrame

briefdescription.para: Draw a box and fill it.

parameterdescription.para: The base frame color. Any color from the frame style overlays this base color.

memberdef.argsstring: (Position pos, const StringView &str)
memberdef.name: drawText

briefdescription.para: Draw a text without warping from the given position.

detaileddescription.para:
A newline breaks to the next line, starting at pos.x. Characters outside this buffer are cut off.
pos
The start position (top-left corner).
str
The text to draw on this buffer.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Text &text, std::size_t animationCycle=0)
memberdef.name: drawText

briefdescription.para: If fg or bg is set to Inherited, the current color from the buffer is used.

detaileddescription.para:
Draw simple text into a rectangle. If fg or bg is set to Inherited, the current color from the buffer is used.
text
The text description.
animationCycle
Animation cycle for animated text.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::string_view text, Rectangle rect, Alignment alignment=Alignment::TopLeft, CharStyle style={}, std::size_t animationCycle=0)
memberdef.name: drawText

briefdescription.para: Draw simple text into a rectangle.

detaileddescription.para:
If fg or bg is set to Inherited, the current color from the buffer is used.
text
The text to render.
rect
The target rectangle.
alignment
The alignment inside the rectangle.
style
The base text style.
animationCycle
Animation cycle for animated text. Invalid UTF-8 bytes are replaced with the Unicode replacement character.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::u32string_view text, Rectangle rect, Alignment alignment=Alignment::TopLeft, CharStyle style={}, std::size_t animationCycle=0)
memberdef.name: drawText

briefdescription.para: This is an overloaded member function, provided for convenience. It differs from the above function only in what argument(s) it accepts.

memberdef.argsstring: (const StringView &text, Rectangle rect, Alignment alignment=Alignment::TopLeft, CharStyle style={}, std::size_t animationCycle=0)
memberdef.name: drawText

briefdescription.para: This is an overloaded member function, provided for convenience. It differs from the above function only in what argument(s) it accepts.

memberdef.argsstring: (const StringView &text, Rectangle rect, const TextOptions &options, std::size_t animationCycle=0)
memberdef.name: drawText

briefdescription.para: This is an overloaded member function, provided for convenience. It differs from the above function only in what argument(s) it accepts.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Bitmap &bitmap, Position pos, const BitmapDrawOptions &options=BitmapDrawOptions::defaultOptions(), std::size_t animationCycle=0) noexcept
memberdef.name: drawBitmap

briefdescription.para: Draw a bitmap at a given position.

detaileddescription.para:
The bitmap is rendered according to options.scaleMode(). If options.char16Style() is set, it overrides the scale mode and renders one terminal cell per bitmap pixel. Pixels or rendered cells outside the buffer are ignored.
bitmap
The bitmap to draw.
pos
The position of the top left corner.
options
Bitmap drawing options.
animationCycle
Animation cycle for color animations.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Bitmap &bitmap, Rectangle rect, Alignment alignment=Alignment::TopLeft, const BitmapDrawOptions &options=BitmapDrawOptions::defaultOptions(), std::size_t animationCycle=0) noexcept
memberdef.name: drawBitmap

briefdescription.para: Draw a bitmap into the given rectangle.

detaileddescription.para:
The rendered bitmap is aligned inside rect. If it is larger than rect, it is cropped according to the alignment.
For half-block drawing mode, alignment and cropping happen at rendered cell boundaries, not per pixel.
bitmap
The bitmap to draw.
rect
The rectangle to draw the bitmap into.
alignment
Alignment of the bitmap within the rectangle.
options
Bitmap drawing options.
animationCycle
Animation cycle for color animations.

memberdef.argsstring: (const ReadableBuffer &buffer, Position targetPos=Position{})
memberdef.name: drawBuffer

briefdescription.para: Draw the contents of another buffer into this one.

detaileddescription.para:
Resulting positions outside the target rectangle are clipped.
buffer
The buffer to draw.
targetPos
The target position where to draw the top-left corner of the buffer.
std::invalid_argument
if buffer is this buffer.

memberdef.argsstring: (const ReadableBuffer &buffer, Rectangle targetRect, Alignment alignment=Alignment::TopLeft)
memberdef.name: drawBuffer

briefdescription.para: Draw the contents of another buffer into this one.

detaileddescription.para:
Resulting positions outside the target rectangle are clipped.
buffer
The buffer to draw.
targetRect
The target rectangle where to draw the buffer. Clips buffer if larger.
alignment
The alignment of the buffer within the target rectangle.
std::invalid_argument
if buffer is this buffer.

memberdef.argsstring: (const ReadableBuffer &buffer, const BufferDrawOptions &options)
memberdef.name: drawBuffer

briefdescription.para: Draw the contents of another buffer into this one.

parameterdescription.para: The options for drawing the buffer.

memberdef.argsstring: (const StringView &text, Coordinate width, const TextOptions &options) noexcept
memberdef.name: textHeightForWidth

briefdescription.para: Calculate the height required to render wrapped text for a given rectangle width.

detaileddescription.para:
The given width is the full target rectangle width, including margins configured in options.
text
The text to measure.
width
The available rectangle width in terminal cells.
options
The text options used for paragraph layout.
The required rectangle height in terminal cells.

memberdef.argsstring: (const ReadableBuffer &other, Char fillChar)
memberdef.name: setFromImpl

briefdescription.para: Implement setFrom().

detaileddescription.para:
The public setFrom() wrapper forwards to this method.
other
The buffer to copy from.
fillChar
The character to use for filling if the sizes differ.

memberdef.argsstring: (Rectangle rect, const Char &fillBlock, const CharCombinationStylePtr &combinationStyle) noexcept
memberdef.name: fillImpl

briefdescription.para: Implement fill(Rectangle, const Char &, ...).

detaileddescription.para:
The public overload forwards to this method.
rect
The rectangle to be filled.
fillBlock
The block for filling.
combinationStyle
The combination style for overwriting existing characters.

memberdef.argsstring: (Rectangle rect, const Tile9StylePtr &style, CharStyle baseStyle, const CharCombinationStylePtr &combinationStyle) noexcept
memberdef.name: fillImpl

briefdescription.para: Implement fill(Rectangle, const Tile9StylePtr &, ...).

detaileddescription.para:
The public overload forwards to this method.
rect
The rectangle to be filled.
style
The tile style to repeat across the rectangle.
baseStyle
The base style underneath the tile style.
combinationStyle
The combination style for overwriting existing characters.

memberdef.argsstring: (Rectangle rect, const Char &frameBlock, std::optional< Char > fillBlock, const CharCombinationStylePtr &combinationStyle) noexcept
memberdef.name: drawFrameImpl

briefdescription.para: Implement the public frame drawing overloads using explicit frame blocks.

detaileddescription.para:
The public block-based overloads forward to this method.
rect
The rectangle for the frame.
frameBlock
The block for the frame.
fillBlock
Optional fill block for the interior.
combinationStyle
The combination style for overwriting existing characters.

memberdef.argsstring: (Rectangle rect, const Char16StylePtr &frameStyle, std::optional< Char > fillBlock, const CharCombinationStylePtr &combinationStyle, Color frameColor) noexcept
memberdef.name: drawFrameImpl

briefdescription.para: Implement the public frame drawing overloads using a Char16 style.

detaileddescription.para:
The public Char16-based overloads forward to this method.
rect
The rectangle for the frame.
frameStyle
The custom frame style.
fillBlock
Optional fill block for the interior.
combinationStyle
The combination style for overwriting existing characters.
frameColor
The base frame color. Any color from the frame style overlays this base color.

memberdef.argsstring: (Rectangle rect, const Tile9StylePtr &style, std::optional< Char > fillBlock, const CharCombinationStylePtr &combinationStyle, Color frameColor) noexcept
memberdef.name: drawFrameImpl

briefdescription.para: Implement the public frame drawing overloads using a Tile9 style.

detaileddescription.para:
The public Tile9-based overloads forward to this method.
rect
The rectangle for the frame.
style
The tile style for the frame.
fillBlock
Optional fill block for the interior.
combinationStyle
The combination style for overwriting existing characters.
frameColor
The base frame color. Any color from the style overlays this base color.

memberdef.argsstring: (Rectangle rect, const FrameDrawOptions &options, std::size_t animationCycle) noexcept
memberdef.name: drawFrameImpl

briefdescription.para: Implement drawFrame(Rectangle, const FrameDrawOptions &, ...).

detaileddescription.para:
The public options overload forwards to this method.
rect
The rectangle for the frame.
options
Frame drawing options.
animationCycle
Animation cycle for frame and fill color animations.

memberdef.argsstring: (Position pos, const GridLayout &layout, const FrameBorder &border) noexcept
memberdef.name: drawGridLayoutImpl

briefdescription.para: Implement drawGridLayout(Position, const GridLayout &, const FrameBorder &).

detaileddescription.para:
The public overload forwards to this method.
pos
The top-left position of the full grid.
layout
The grid cell layout.
border
The frame border styling for the grid lines.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Text &text, std::size_t animationCycle)
memberdef.name: drawTextImpl

briefdescription.para: Implement drawText(const Text &, ...).

detaileddescription.para:
The public overload forwards to this method.
text
The text description.
animationCycle
Animation cycle for animated text.

memberdef.argsstring: (const StringView &text, Rectangle rect, Alignment alignment, CharStyle style, std::size_t animationCycle)
memberdef.name: drawTextImpl

briefdescription.para: Implement drawText(StringView, Rectangle, ...).

detaileddescription.para:
The public overload forwards to this method.
text
The text to render.
rect
The target rectangle.
alignment
The alignment inside the rectangle.
style
The text color.
animationCycle
Animation cycle for animated text.

memberdef.argsstring: (const StringView &text, Rectangle rect, const TextOptions &options, std::size_t animationCycle)
memberdef.name: drawTextImpl

briefdescription.para: Implement drawText(StringView, Rectangle, TextOptions, ...).

detaileddescription.para:
The public overload forwards to this method.
text
The text to render.
rect
The target rectangle.
options
The text drawing options.
animationCycle
Animation cycle for animated text.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Bitmap &bitmap, Position pos, const BitmapDrawOptions &options, std::size_t animationCycle) noexcept
memberdef.name: drawBitmapImpl

briefdescription.para: Implement drawBitmap(const Bitmap &, Position, ...).

detaileddescription.para:
The public overload forwards to this method.
bitmap
The bitmap to draw.
pos
The position of the top left corner.
options
Bitmap drawing options.
animationCycle
Animation cycle for color animations.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Bitmap &bitmap, Rectangle rect, Alignment alignment, const BitmapDrawOptions &options, std::size_t animationCycle) noexcept
memberdef.name: drawBitmapImpl

briefdescription.para: Implement drawBitmap(const Bitmap &, Rectangle, ...).

detaileddescription.para:
The public overload forwards to this method.
bitmap
The bitmap to draw.
rect
The rectangle to draw the bitmap into.
alignment
Alignment of the bitmap within the rectangle.
options
Bitmap drawing options.
animationCycle
Animation cycle for color animations.

briefdescription.para: Abstract writable terminal buffer interface.

detaileddescription.para: This base class combines the read-only ReadableBuffer API with mutation and higher-level drawing helpers such as frames, text, and bitmap rendering. Concrete implementations like Buffer provide the actual storage.
